scheme.name: Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Food Processing Industry (PLISFPI)

benefits.name: Incentive on incremental sales of processed food
benefits.summary: Performance-linked incentive paid on incremental sales of eligible processed-food products (and for branding/marketing abroad), aimed primarily at larger food processing companies but with some components relevant to growing MSMEs.
benefits.calculation_logic: Incentive computed as a percentage of incremental sales over a base year, subject to eligibility thresholds on minimum sales and committed investment; separate support for branding/marketing abroad. Thresholds generally favour mid-to-large firms.

metadata.notes: Primarily targets larger food processing firms (minimum sales/investment thresholds); MSME applicability is limited to specific components (for example millet-based products, SME/innovative categories). Confirm current window and thresholds.

suggested_faqs.question: What is the main objective of Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Food Processing Industry (PLISFPI)?
suggested_faqs.answer: The main objective is to provide assistance and support under Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Food Processing Industry (PLISFPI) to eligible beneficiaries.

suggested_faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Food Processing Industry (PLISFPI)?
suggested_faqs.answer: Businesses belonging to small, medium in food_processing may apply.
